person.userCertifiedLifeSummary:
Her maiden name is not Newland. Read  the supporting sources.
1. Great Migration Begins: Immigrants to N.E. 1620-1633, Vols. I-III  page 1018 
https://www.americanancestors.org/databases/great-migration-begins-immigrants-to-ne-1620-1633-vols-i-iii/image/?volumeId=12107&pageName=1018&rId=1415515205
 
2.  National Genealogy Society Quarterly Vol 75 pg 105
 POSTED IN MEMORIES
 -=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-     
Henry Howland married Mary ____ by about 1628. Mary Howland who had been the wife of Henry, died at Duxbury, 16 Jun 1674.
Their 7 children: Abigail Young, Zoeth, Samuel, John, Mary Cudworth, Sarah Dennis, Elizabeth Allen, & Joseph.

zh.lifeSummary: Mary Unknown於1609年4月16日出生在英國亨廷格多史爾分斯坦頓。她於1627年與Henry Howland II of Fenstanton.在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1674年6月17日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼普萊姆斯度波利享年65歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼普萊姆斯度波利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Mary Unknown于1609年4月16日出生在英国亨廷格多史爾分斯坦頓。她于1627年与Henry Howland II of Fenstanton.在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1674年6月17日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼普萊姆斯度波利享年65岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼普萊姆斯度波利。

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: Mary Unknown was born on 16 April 1609, in Fenstanton, Huntingdonshire, England. She married Henry Howland II of Fenstanton. in 1627, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 17 June 1674, in Duxbury, Plymouth, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 65, and was buried in Duxbury, Plymouth, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Mary Unknown est née le 16 avril 1609, à Fenstanton, Huntingdonshire, Angleterre. Elle a épousé Henry Howland II of Fenstanton. en 1627, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 17 juin 1674, à Duxbury, Plymouth, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 65 ans, et a été enterrée à Duxbury, Plymouth, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique.

ja.lifeSummary: Mary Unknownは1609年4月16日にイギリスハンティングドンシュアイアフエンスタントンで生まれた。1627年にイギリスイギリスでHenry Howland II of Fenstanton.と結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1674年6月17日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニープリモウスダクスブリーで65歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニープリモウスダクスブリーにて埋葬された。

ko.Duxbury, Massachusetts Bay, British Colo: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 플림우스 드스버이
ko.Duxbury, Plymouth, Massachusetts, Britis: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 플림우스 드스버이
ko.Freetown, Bristol, Massachusetts: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 플림우스 드스버이
ko.Duxbury, Plymouth Colony, British Coloni: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 플림우스 콜론이 드스버이
ko.Duxbury, Plymouth, Massachusetts, USA: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 플림우스 콜론이 드스버이
ko.Duxbury, Plymouth, Massachusetts Bay Col: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 플림우스 드스버이
ko.lifeSummary: Mary Unknown(은)는 1609년 4월 16일 영국 헌틴그도실르 펜스탠턴에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1627년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Henry Howland II of Fenstanton.(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1674년 6월 17일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 플림우스 드스버이에서 65세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 플림우스 드스버이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Mary Unknown nasceu em 16 de abril de 1609, em Fenstanton, Huntingdonshire, Inglaterra. Ela casou-se com Henry Howland II of Fenstanton. em 1627, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 17 de junho de 1674, em Duxbury, Plymouth, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 65 anos, e foi sepultada em Duxbury, Plymouth, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Mary Unknown родилась 16 апреля 1609 г. в местности фенстантон, хантингдоншир, Англия. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Henry Howland II of Fenstanton. в 1627 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла 17 июня 1674 г. в местности дуксбури, плимоут, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 65 лет и была похоронена в местности дуксбури, плимоут, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: Mary Unknown nació el 16 de abril de 1609, en Fenstanton, Huntingdonshire, Inglaterra. Se casó con Henry Howland II of Fenstanton. en 1627, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 17 de junio de 1674, en Duxbury, Plymouth, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 65 años, y fue sepultada en Duxbury, Plymouth, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.
